tests.name: Main menu renders
Attract-mode backdrop canvas present
Match history panel renders
Multiplayer lobby section renders
Challenge inbox container present
In-app confirm dialog present (surrender / start-over flows)
Start Match button renders
Back-to-work button present in top bar
Speed dropdown (1×–4×) present in top bar
Very small map option in solo picker
Very small map option in multiplayer picker
Per-unit health strip container present
Groups bar container present
Difficulty hint line present under the dropdown
Difficulty hint shows the Normal blurb by default
Select/Drag mode toggle present
Select mode button is icon-only (cursor svg)
Drag mode button is icon-only (dashed-box svg)
Surrender button is the flag emoji
How to Play brief block renders
How to Play states the combined defeat condition (no settlements + under 5 units)
How to Play summarizes the three unit roles
tests.expectText: One unit type, three switchable roles

tests.name: Resume button present for cross-device saves
